keyFindings.definition: Andrej Karpathy Feb 2025 - fully give in to the vibes, embrace exponentials, forget code exists. Natural language prompts to LLM, accept code without review, iterate by prompting.
keyFindings.tools: Cursor (Composer/Agent), Claude Code, Windsurf, Replit, GitHub Copilot
keyFindings.simonWillison: If you reviewed, tested, understood all code - thats NOT vibe coding, thats using LLM as typing assistant
keyFindings.risks: Bugs, security holes, no accountability, not for production
keyFindings.germanMarket: Low adoption in Mittelstand, risk-averse, DSGVO concerns, but potential for agency prototyping
keyFindings.lukasAngle: 2-phase model: Lukas vibe-codes prototype, Stas makes production-ready. Speed + Quality.
